# `!proxmox_migrate`

**Category:** proxmox

Live (online) or offline migration of a Proxmox VM or LXC guest from a source node to a target node. Blocks until the migration task completes or times out.

## Parameters

| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `api_host` | string | yes | Proxmox API host. |
| `api_token_id` | string | yes | Proxmox API token ID. |
| `api_token_secret` | string | yes | Proxmox API token secret. |
| `source_node` | string | yes | Node the guest currently resides on. |
| `target_node` | string | yes | Node to migrate the guest to. |
| `vmid` | int | yes | Guest VMID. |
| `guest_type` | string | yes | vm/qemu or lxc/container. |
| `online` | bool | no | For VMs: live migration. Default true. |
| `restart` | bool | no | For LXCs: restart guest after migration. Default true. |
| `timeout` | int | no | Seconds to wait for migration to finish. Default 300. |

## Examples

```yaml
- !proxmox_migrate
  api_host: '{{ proxmox_host }}'
  api_token_id: '{{ proxmox_token_id }}'
  api_token_secret: '{{ proxmox_token_secret }}'
  source_node: bee
  target_node: moth
  vmid: 100
  guest_type: lxc
  online: true
```
